name: harness-runtime
description: Runnable OpenCode plugin scaffold for harness

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && bun build src/server.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && bun build src/tui.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.verify: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
